quote: Christian led and exceeded the expectations of his participation in the Design System project for HUGE doing a deep research about it and proposing a clear Roadmap for the implementation of the next stages applying all his knowledge and tools of the Design Thinking methodology.
name: Bryan Le

quote: For creating a visually appealing, user-centric experience and coordinating a successful design and content strategy. I can say that working with Christian was an amazing experience.
name: Amber Qalagari

quote: Christian is an intelligent and talented designer and was a pleasure to work with. He worked in my team on a very technical and challenging role as a design lead. I was frequently pleasantly surprised about the speed and quality of Christian's work. Christian demonstrated an excellent balance of autonomy combined with collaboration — proactively sharing work and seeking feedback. He has an excellent eye for design and regularly went above and beyond with his design deliverables.
name: Nick Matterson
role: Director of User Experience Design, BlackRock
